zh.Broughton Poggs, Oxfordshire, England: 英國奧可福爾鮑頓 波格斯
zh.Beaudesert, Warwickshire, England: 英國瓦維其可爾波奧德瑟特
zh.Upper Heyford, Oxfordshire, England: 英國奧可福爾武坡 海易福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrice de Chesney於大約1115年出生在英國奧可福爾迪丁頓時，她的父親Roger de Chesney37歲，母親Alice Langetot43歲。她和Ralph Murdac至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1170年在英國享年56歲。

zh-hans.Broughton Poggs, Oxfordshire, England: 英国奧可福爾鮑頓 波格斯
zh-hans.Beaudesert, Warwickshire, England: 英国瓦維其可爾波奧德瑟特
zh-hans.Upper Heyford, Oxfordshire, England: 英国奧可福爾武坡 海易福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrice de Chesney于大约1115年出生在英国奧可福爾迪丁頓时，她的父亲Roger de Chesney37岁，母亲Alice Langetot43岁。她和Ralph Murdac至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1170年在英国享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Chesney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and Irish (Antrim, Down): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac (an) tSasanaigh, see McChesney .
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Chaney  , a cognate of 3 below.
French: topographic name for someone who lived by or in an oak wood, from Old French chesnai ‘oak grove’ (from chesne ‘oak’). Compare Cheney 2.

variants.name: McChesney
meanings: Scottish (Galloway) and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac (an) tSasanaigh ‘son of the Saxon (i.e. the Englishman)’. The spelling seems to represent Mac Shasanaigh, to be pronounced originally as McHasney, rather than the English spelling ch.

variants.name: Chestnut
meanings: Scottish (Renfrewshire and Lanarkshire) and northern Irish: altered form of Chesney , shortened from McChesney . Its assimilation to the English word chestnut is due to folk etymology, the word itself being first recorded in 1519. The surname was probably taken to Ireland at the time of the 17th-century Plantation of Ulster.
English (Norfolk): probably a variant of Chestney (see Chaney ), altered by folk etymological association with the word chestnut.

variants.name: Chesna
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Chesney  .

nameMeanings.name: Beatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrice de Chesney was born about 1115, in Deddington, Oxfordshire, England, her father, Roger de Chesney, was 37 and her mother, Alice Langetot, was 43. She had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Ralph Murdac. She died in 1170, in England, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrice de Chesney est née environ 1115, à Deddington, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Chesney, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Alice Langetot, avait 43 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Ralph Murdac. Elle est décédée en 1170, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrice de Chesney um 1115 in Deddington, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger de Chesney 37 und ihre Mutter Alice Langetot 43. Sie hatte mit Ralph Murdac mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1170 im Alter von 56 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice de Chesney è nata il circa 1115 nel Deddington, Oxfordshire, England, sua padre, Roger de Chesney, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Alice Langetot, aveva 43 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Ralph Murdac. Morì nel 1170, nel England, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.Lazenby, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアラズエンビー

ja.Upper Heyford, Oxfordshire, England: イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアウップエル ヘイフォード
ja.lifeSummary: Beatrice de Chesneyが約1115年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアデッドイントンで生まれた時，父Roger de Chesneyは37歳，母Alice Langetotは43歳であった。彼女はRalph Murdacとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1170年にイギリスで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrice de Chesney(이)가 대략 1115년 영국 스퍼드실르 데딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger de Chesney(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Langetot(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 Ralph Murdac(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1170년 영국에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrice de Chesney nasceu aproximadamente 1115, em Deddington, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger de Chesney, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Alice Langetot, tinha 43 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Ralph Murdac. Ela faleceu em 1170, em Inglaterra, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrice de Chesney родилась около 1115 г. в местности деддингтон, оксфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger de Chesney было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Langetot, 43. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Ralph Murdac. Она умерла в 1170 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrice de Chesney nació aproximadamente 1115, en Deddington, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger de Chesney, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Alice Langetot, tenía 43 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Ralph Murdac. Murió en 1170, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años.
